creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Request to provide login access to the server (jail?) environment(s) currently servicing wiki.freebsd.org, to the members of the Wiki Admin Team:

* gavin, remko, theraven, linimon, koobs

Please also provide any additional instructions for configuring/executing authentication. If any information is sensitive (hostnames, etc) please let us know where/how we can obtain it securely.

If there is any documentation that is also relevant to the configuration/management/etc of the wiki environment, please also provide these so we may review them.
